code: import api from'./api';export const askQuestion=question=>api.post('/chat/ask',{question});export const getChatHistory=function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:20;return api.get('/chat/history',{params:{page,limit}});};
